name: aura-core
description: Aura-core with SkyGrid node bootstrap, validator telemetry, and Vercel-ready static landing deployment

scripts.build: node --check app.js && node --check scripts/validator-health-check.mjs && echo 'SkyGrid Vercel build ready'
scripts.prod: AURA_MODE=prod SKYGRID_TRACE=false SKYGRID_LEVEL=info NODE_ENV=production node app.js --network=skygrid-main --listen=0.0.0.0:7000 --max-peers=16 --heartbeat-interval=5000 --log-level=info
scripts.debug: AURA_MODE=debug SKYGRID_TRACE=true SKYGRID_LEVEL=verbose NODE_ENV=development node --inspect=127.0.0.1:9230 app.js --node-id=node-001 --network=skygrid-main --listen=0.0.0.0:7000 --peer=10.0.0.10:7000 --peer=10.0.0.11:7000 --max-peers=16 --heartbeat-interval=5000 --log-level=debug
scripts.mesh:node1: AURA_MODE=debug SKYGRID_TRACE=true SKYGRID_LEVEL=verbose NODE_ENV=development node app.js --node-id=node-001 --network=skygrid-main --listen=127.0.0.1:7001 --peer=127.0.0.1:7002 --peer=127.0.0.1:7003 --max-peers=16 --heartbeat-interval=3000 --log-level=debug
scripts.mesh:node2: AURA_MODE=debug SKYGRID_TRACE=true SKYGRID_LEVEL=verbose NODE_ENV=development node app.js --node-id=node-002 --network=skygrid-main --listen=127.0.0.1:7002 --peer=127.0.0.1:7001 --peer=127.0.0.1:7003 --max-peers=16 --heartbeat-interval=3000 --log-level=debug
scripts.mesh:node3: AURA_MODE=debug SKYGRID_TRACE=true SKYGRID_LEVEL=verbose NODE_ENV=development node app.js --node-id=node-003 --network=skygrid-main --listen=127.0.0.1:7003 --peer=127.0.0.1:7001 --peer=127.0.0.2:7002 --max-peers=16 --heartbeat-interval=3000 --log-level=debug
